conversation.content:
Reconcile the following columns. Document has 11 pages. Sources are anonymous (A and B).

COLUMNS:

---
Column 1: OS Rate (%) | Overall | Treatment
Definition: What percentage of total patients in the experimental arm survived at the latest follow-up? If reported, include the rate (percentage) and any accompanying details. If multiple arms are reported, list each arm separately. Use 'Not reported' if missing.
  A: value="62.7% (95% CI, 58.7 to 66.7) at 4 years" | page=4 | modality=text | reasoning="The text states: 'The overall survival at 4 years was 62.7% (95% CI, 58.7 to 66.7) in the darolutamide group'."
  B: value="62.7% (95% CI, 58.7 to 66.7) at 4 years" | page=4 | modality=text | reasoning="Found in the results section of page 4, stating the overall survival at 4 years for the darolutamide group."

---

  A: value="50.4% (95% CI, 46.3 to 54.6) at 4 years" | page=4 | modality=text | reasoning="The text states: 'The overall survival at 4 years was ... and 50.4% (95% CI, 46.3 to 54.6) in the placebo group.'"
  B: value="50.4% (95% CI, 46.3 to 54.6) at 4 years" | page=4 | modality=text | reasoning="Found in the results section of page 4, stating the overall survival at 4 years for the placebo group."
